parsed_output.justification: Justin's behavior is highly characteristic of the Tanner, as he repeatedly encourages the group to vote for him ('I would rather you all vote for me'). James, conversely, is aggressively directing the vote toward Justin and claiming to be the Troublemaker to provide a logical justification for Justin being the Werewolf. This pattern suggests James is the Werewolf attempting to frame the Tanner to ensure his own survival.
